description: Execute one story dev-phase до status=review (delegates engineer or domain role-skill; auditor verdict — отдельный clean-context flow через /bmad-tds-code-review)
Execute epic via integration-branch (sequential stories on epic_branch)
Review story (Mode 1) or epic (Mode 2 — final squash merge through tds deliver)
Generate or update docs (delegates auditor for review + writer for prose; engineer for inline code-comments)
Sprint retrospective — auditor analysis + lessons extraction (writer formulates) + Bridge Plan proposal (записывается в retro-md, не creates bridge сразу)

Curated pre-epic из накопленных retros — aggregate ## Bridge Plan секций, auditor refinement, user dialog, bulk-apply через tds epic create-bridge-from-retros. Output — bridge в authoring-pending state: stub specs created с TBD AC/Tasks, user authoring required + tds epic bridge validate-specs before execute.
Phase finalization — snapshot stories+state into <output_folder>/_archive/<phase> + writer-generated phase-summary.md
Test-author phase: ATDD + independent test-review с retry-loop. Delegates BMAD TEA (bmad-testarch-atdd + bmad-testarch-test-review). Hard dependency на bmad-tea-module.
Process role-skill — orientation only; reads state, proposes next step (sub-skill invocation typical)
Process role-skill — implementation; code-write + story-ops + integrity-record (sub-skill invocation typical)
Process role-skill — verification; review-read + integrity-verify (sub-skill invocation typical)
Process role-skill — documentation prose; README/CHANGELOG/runbooks/ADR (doc-files only, not code)
Domain role-skill — Python (FastAPI, Django, asyncio, pandas) with techstack-pack guidance
Domain role-skill — C# / .NET (ASP.NET Core, EF Core, Blazor) with techstack-pack guidance
Domain role-skill — JVM (Spring Boot, Hibernate, Kotlin-backend) with techstack-pack guidance
Domain role-skill — Web frontend (React, Vue, Angular + a11y/quality) with techstack-pack guidance
Domain role-skill — Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, Core Data, App Store with techstack-pack guidance
Domain role-skill — Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room, Hilt, Coroutines/Flow with techstack-pack guidance
